messages.content:
You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","i2c_default":{"sda":8,"scl":9}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Read a BME280 over I2C at 0x76 and print T, P, H every second.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"raspberry-pi-pico","name":"Raspberry Pi Pico","mcu":"RP2040","i2c_default":{"sda":4,"scl":5}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Read a BME680 (BSEC2) and print IAQ + T + RH every 3 seconds.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"adafruit-feather-esp32-s3","name":"Adafruit Feather ESP32-S3","mcu":"ESP32-S3","i2c_default":{"sda":3,"scl":4},"special":["STEMMA QT (power gate GPIO7)"]}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Drive a 128x64 SSD1306 OLED on the STEMMA QT bus, show "ready".

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"raspberry-pi-pico","name":"Raspberry Pi Pico","mcu":"RP2040","i2c_default":{"sda":4,"scl":5}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Read accelerometer + gyro from an MPU6050 every 50 ms and print pitch/roll estimated from accel only.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"adafruit-feather-nrf52840-sense","name":"Adafruit Feather nRF52840 Sense","mcu":"nRF52840","i2c_default":{"sda":22,"scl":23}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Read the onboard SHT30 humidity + temperature sensor and print every second.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","i2c_default":{"sda":8,"scl":9}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Scan the I2C bus and print every responder address.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"seeed-xiao-esp32-c3","name":"Seeed XIAO ESP32-C3","mcu":"ESP32-C3","i2c_default":{"sda":6,"scl":7}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Read a SHT41 over I2C at 0x44 and print T, RH every 2 seconds.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"raspberry-pi-pico","name":"Raspberry Pi Pico","mcu":"RP2040","i2c_default":{"sda":4,"scl":5}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Drive a 128x64 SH1106 OLED at 0x3C and show a counter that ticks every second.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"adafruit-feather-nrf52840-sense","name":"Adafruit Feather nRF52840 Sense","mcu":"nRF52840","i2c_default":{"sda":22,"scl":23}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Read the onboard BMP280 pressure and APDS9960 light + proximity, print all three every second.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"arduino-uno-r4-wifi","name":"Arduino UNO R4 WiFi","mcu":"RA4M1","i2c_default":{"sda":18,"scl":19}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Read a BME280 at 0x76 and only print when temperature crosses 25 C in either direction.
